name: GOLFTEC Denver Tech Center
about: GOLFTEC Denver Tech Center is a high-tech golf training facility focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting. The facility utilizes advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise swing feedback and personalized coaching. Services include private lessons, practice memberships, and custom club fitting with the goal of accelerating improvement through objective analysis and tailored game plans.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
PGA Award-winning coaches providing data-driven, personalized instruction
Structured improvement plans with re-evaluations to track progress

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned. The facility appears focused on training.
No alcohol service mentioned. The facility appears focused on training.

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as a product sold and used with launch monitor technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs for lessons and practice. The facility also offers club fitting services and has a pro shop where you can rent or purchase clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, and no policy against bringing your own is specified. The focus is on the training environment.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not provide a specific time for a full 18-hole simulation as the primary focus is on lessons, practice, and fitting rather than on-course simulation play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly and do they offer programs for juniors?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC is kid-friendly and offers programs for juniors. They use video analysis, motion capture, and launch monitors to simplify complex swing concepts for younger players and provide a structured learning environment.
